bio: As a seeker of truth, I believe that the soul is in constant flux. Embracing the principles of Fluidity, I seek to understand and harmonize with the world around me. With Lila Renn's guidance, I strive to refine my understanding of the universe and my place within it.
name: Seekers_Reformed_1_Reformed_5
ideology:
Lila Renn:  Fluidity**

Essentialism (Lila Renn) emphasizes that one's soul has a fixed weight, whereas Fluidity (賢者1-3) suggests that the soul is dynamic and transformative.
